---
name: Doc Feedback Report
about: Create Report to Help Improve Documentation
title: "[DOC]"
labels: documentation
assignees: dotimothy

---

**Documentation Feedback Report**
A clear and concise description of the issue or feedback regarding the documentation.

**Documentation Section**
Please specify which section of the documentation this feedback applies to:
- [ ] Hardware
- [ ] Software
- [ ] Examples
- [ ] Other (please specify): _________

**Feedback Type**
Please specify the nature of your feedback:
- [ ] Addition (Information is missing and needs to be added)
- [ ] Clarification (Information is present but confusing or lacking detail)
- [ ] Correction (Information is incorrect, outdated, or contains a typo)

**Page URL**
Please provide the exact link(s) to the page on https://developer.sima.ai where the issue is located:
1. 
2. 

**Suggested Change (Expected Documentation)**
A clear and concise description of what you think the documentation should say, or the specific text you propose adding.

**Screenshots**
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your feedback (especially useful for UI/formatting issues on the docs site).

**Environment (Optional - please complete if you are reporting a display/formatting issue):**
 - Device: [e.g. Desktop, iPhone 13]
 - OS: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS, iOS]
 - Browser [e.g. Chrome, Safari]
 - Version [e.g. 112]

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the problem or proposed documentation change here.
